evals.name: hypothesis_test_routing
evals.description: User asks whether tutorial videos get significantly more watch time than haul videos. Should route to hypothesis-test atom.

input.user_message: Is there a significant difference in watch time between my tutorials and hauls? Here's my data.

evals.name: regression_routing
evals.description: User asks about the relationship between posting frequency and subscriber growth. Should route to regression-analysis atom.

input.user_message: Can you run a regression to see if my posting frequency affects subscriber growth? I have 12 months of data.

evals.name: forecast_routing
evals.description: User asks for a subscriber growth prediction for the next 6 months. Should route to forecast atom.

input.user_message: Predict my subscriber growth for the next 6 months based on my channel data.

evals.name: ab_test_routing
evals.description: User asks to design a thumbnail A/B test. Should route to ab-test atom.

input.user_message: Design a thumbnail A/B test for my next video. I want to compare a dark moody thumbnail vs. a bright one.

evals.name: no_mcp_tool_gap_record
evals.description: User requests a hypothesis test but no MCP stats tool is connected. Should emit a gap-record, not fabricate results.

input.user_message: Is my watch time significantly different on weekdays vs. weekends?
